selectedSkills.name: generate-test-cases
selectedSkills.reason: AC specifies multiple complex validation rules (age range, name length, email format).

selectedSkills.name: execute-tests
selectedSkills.reason: Functional verification of the registration flow and results table update is essential.

selectedSkills.reason: Always included to handle potential failures.

visual.reason: No design mocks or visual assets provided in the story inputs.
